meta.title: GPT Jazz (Generative Pre-trained Transformer Jazz Music)
meta.description:
Join me once more on this exhilarating adventure of creating music with artificial intelligence. 
In this video, we'll harness the power of OpenAI's GPT models to generate text that will be transformed into mesmerizing MIDI music. And guess what? It's the birth of a new genre: GPT Jazz! 
Get ready for an incredible blend of excitement, thrill, and an electrifying experience like never before!
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Jump on the hype train for this channel, and help me crank out even more wicked videos like this one:
https://www.patreon.com/NobodyandTheComputer
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------
contact me: 
nobodyandthecomputer@gmail.com
__________________________________________________

https://www.patreon.com/posts/open-ai-preset-86296693
__________________________________________________

00:00 Intro
01:18 Introducing GPT Jazz
02:08 Text representation to MIDI
02:57 Twinkle but Jazz 
04:58 MF DOOM over GPT Jazz
05:53 Jazz Ballad
08:16 Open AI Playground
10:46 Coltrane Ballad
11:35 Video with Pika Labs
12:25 Outro
